name: OfflineDownloader
maintenance_message: 此项目已停止维护，感谢你的使用。

zh: 管理员新增配置备份/恢复，可导出账号、额度、设置、Tracker 和任务来源等配置。
恢复配置前会自动保存当前配置快照，避免误操作后无法找回。
en: Admins can now back up and restore configuration such as accounts, quotas, settings, trackers, and task sources.
A snapshot of the current configuration is saved before restore to reduce accidental data loss.
